DISCOVERY 302, MATTER A R G U E D: AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT BRADLEY SHAPIRO, M.D., BRADLEY SHAPERO, DR.'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE REMAINING BALANCE OF SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT TOTALING $200.00 NO LATER THAN JUNE 4, 2012. SHOULD PLAINTIFF FAIL TO PAY THE REMAINING BALANCE OF SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT TOTALING $200.00 BY JUNE 4, 2012, DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR EX PARTE FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO HEAR A MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS BY JUNE 25, 2012. SEE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES WATSON, NOT REPORTED.

THE MOTION IS GRANTED ON THE GROUNDS SET FORTH IN THE MOVING PAPERS, AND: (1) THE MOTION IS NOT OPPOSED. (2) PLAINTIFF WESTMAN HAS NOT SUBMITTED ANY RESPONSE OR PROPOSED RESPONSE TO THE DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Plaintiff'S Medical And Psychiatric Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marcell Patrick Neri, Esq., from Hassard Bonnington LLP, for Defendant and moving party

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT BRADLEY SHAPIRO, M.D.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Plaintiff'S Medical And Psychiatric Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted, with monetary sanctions awarded against plaintiff Wendy Westman in the amount of $595. The Motion is granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers and the motion is not opposed. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge Katherine Huibonhoa, not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marcell Patrick Neri, Esq., of Hassard Bonnington, Tel. 415.288.9800, appearing for defendant and moving party.
No other appearance.

For ethical reasons, Defendant's counsel informed the court of what transpired between him and the plaintiff several days prior to today's hearing. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRADLEY SHAPIRO, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Joe Vickstein CSR # 4780

wemdu westman, plaintiff appearing in pro per.

marcell patrick neri, esq., hassard bonnington llp, tel. 415.288.9800, for defendant and moving party bradley shapiro, m.d.

matter A R G U E D: at conclusion of argument, the court denies DEFENDANT BRADLEY SHAPIRO, M.D., BRADLEY SHAPERO, DR.'s Motion for Terminating Sanctions. plaintiff shall pay the remaining balance of sanctions to defendant totaling $200.00 no later than June 4, 2012. Should plaintiff fail to pay the remaining balance of sanctions to defendant totaling $200.00 by june 4, 2012, defendant may appear ex parte for an order shortening time to hear a motion for terminating sanctions by june 25, 2012. see written order.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BRADLEY SHAPIRO, M.D'S Motion To Compel plaintiff for Discovery Responses is Granted, with monetary sanctions awarded against plaintiff Wendy Westman in the amount of $360 (assuming no hearing). The Motion is granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers, and: (1) the Motion is not opposed.
